meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [3.0.0] - 2024-03-11

### Added

n/a

### Changed

- migrated from SAMM version `2.0.0` to `2.1.0`
- renamed property `materialDemand` to `weekBasedMaterialDemand`
- updated external references of `urn:samm:io.catenax.shared.uuid` to version `2.0.0`

### Removed

n/a

## [2.0.0] - 2023-11-13

### Added

n/a

### Changed

- renamed property `weekBasedMaterialDemand` to `materialDemand`
- use [`io.catenax.shared.uuid`](https://github.com/eclipse-tractusx/sldt-semantic-models/blob/main/io.catenax.shared.uuid/1.0.0/Uuid.ttl) trait for UUIDs

### Removed

n/a

## [1.0.0] - 2023-05-08

### Added

- initial version of this model

### Changed

n/a

### Removed

n/a

nodes.label: IdBasedRequestForUpdate
nodes.description:
The requirements for a request for update from another Catena-X Partner of a specific entity.
If within the payload, no specific object type is defined (Payload empty), than an update of all objects within the sender receiver relation is requested).

nodes.label: weekBasedMaterialDemand
nodes.description:
Material demands the supplier requests an update for.
If within the array, no specific ID (array empty), than an update of all IDs is requested).

nodes.label: weekBasedCapacityGroup
nodes.description:
Capacity groups the customer requests an update for.
If within the array, no specific ID (array empty), than an update of all IDs is requested).

nodes.label: materialDemandId
nodes.description: The Material Demand ID uniquely identifies the material demand the supplier requests an update for within the business relationship between the customer and its supplier.

nodes.label: changedAt
nodes.description: Point in time of the last update known to the requesting business partner. If the requested entity has been changed more recently, the requested party should resend the data. If the changedAt property is not given, the latest entity should be send without precondition.

nodes.label: capacityGroupId
nodes.description: The Capacity Group ID uniquely identifies the capacity group the supplier requests an update for within the business relationship between the supplier and its customer.

nodes.label: WeekBasedMaterialDemandCharacteristic
nodes.description: A list of material demand UUIDs without duplicates an update is requested for.

nodes.label: WeekBasedCapacityGroupCharacteristic
nodes.description: A list of capacity group UUIDs without duplicates an update is requested for.

nodes.label: WeekBasedMaterialDemandEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulates the information that is necessary for an update request.

nodes.label: WeekBasedCapacityGroupEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulates the information that is necessary for an update request.

nodes.label: Timestamp
nodes.description: Describes a Property which contains the date and time with an optional timezone.
